utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. Checking the final package: (1) destination is included with city and country → fully specified; (2) travel_dates are clearly specified with start and end dates → fully specified; (3) transportation includes flight details with costs, airline, and baggage info → fully specified; (4) accommodation includes name, type, rating, price, amenities, and eco_certified → fully specified; (5) activities are listed with names, locations, durations, and inclusion status but **no costs per activity**, so not fully specified according to the required format; (6) additional_services includes restaurant details with prices, so fully specified; (7) total_budget includes cost breakdown and total → fully specified. Therefore, 6 out of 7 items are fully specified.
